**输入:** nums = [0,1,2,3]

**输出:** 2

| (2, 3)   | (2, 3)   | `min(|2 − 3|, |2 + 3|) = 1` | 2               | `max(|2 − 3|, |2 + 3|) = 5` | 3               |

def solve(nums)
  sorted = nums.map(&:abs).sort
  n = sorted.size
  count = 0
  (0...n-1).each do |i|
    target = 2 * sorted[i]
    low = i + 1
    high = n - 1
    res = i
    while low <= high
      mid = (low + high) / 2
      if sorted[mid] <= target
        res = mid
        low = mid + 1
      else
        high = mid - 1
      end
    end
    count += (res - i)
  end
  count
end
